title: Preview Card
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Preview Card primitive preserving model-owned open state, link trigger hover/focus/press facts, deterministic delay and placement attributes, portal, positioner, popup, viewport, arrow, backdrop, transition, detached-trigger, and keyboard-dismiss surfaces.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, Dom, and message helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, Predicate, and Effect composition for serializable options and command helpers.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Preview Card primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Preview Card primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state and active trigger identity are model-owned inputs; trigger and popup interactions emit open-change facts instead of mutating hidden component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers decide whether hover, focus, press, delay, and disabled facts update their model.

deviations.summary: Delay and closeDelay are exposed as deterministic attributes and open-change facts rather than hidden timers.
deviations.rationale: The installable primitive remains pure. Shared timer or subscription behavior can be added later through a reusable Foldkit abstraction.

deviations.summary: Placement is represented through deterministic side, align, offset, collision, positioner, viewport, and arrow attributes without performing DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision handling depends on runtime geometry and should be shared with Popover and Tooltip rather than implemented ad hoc in Preview Card.
